clusters.title: NVIDIA Blackwell Production Ramp
clusters.summary: Multiple sources report NVIDIA's next-gen Blackwell architecture entering mass production at TSMC, with datacenter shipments expected Q2 2026.

clusters.title: OpenAI Enterprise Expansion
clusters.summary: OpenAI announces expanded enterprise tier with dedicated compute, SOC2 compliance, and custom model fine-tuning for Fortune 500 clients.

clusters.title: Cloud GPU Shortage Easing
clusters.summary: AWS, Azure, and GCP all report improved H100 availability. Wait times for GPU instances down 60% from December peak.

clusters.title: Anthropic Series D Closing
clusters.summary: Anthropic reportedly closing $2B Series D at $60B valuation, led by Google and Spark Capital.

clusters.title: Meta AI Research Restructure
clusters.summary: Meta consolidating FAIR and GenAI teams under single leadership, signaling increased focus on product integration.
